title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header
summary: Lighthouse and Nikto report no CSP on staging2.willowyhollow.com. Add Content-Security-Policy via SiteGround Optimizer or server config before production deploy.

title: Missing Strict-Transport-Security header
summary: HSTS not set on staging2.willowyhollow.com. Enable HSTS in SG Security or nginx/apache once HTTPS is confirmed stable on staging.

title: Lighthouse performance CLS regression on checkout
summary: Lighthouse CI flagged Cumulative Layout Shift 0.18 on /checkout/ (threshold 0.1). Likely late-loading web fonts or SG combined CSS; investigate theme enqueue order.

title: WordPress XML-RPC exposed
summary: Nikto detected XML-RPC enabled on staging2.willowyhollow.com. Disable via SG Security or mu-plugin if unused — common brute-force vector.

title: Kiro review: prioritize CSP before plugin updates
summary: Review of combined Lighthouse + wp-sec findings: fix CSP and HSTS on staging before bumping plugin versions. Reduces attack surface during deploy window.
